subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond all utterance and understanding, beseemeth that Beloved One Whose loving-kindness hath encompassed the entire world... May ye, through divine bounty, attain and be moved to voice that which refineth the character of all His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از بیان و عرفان محبوبی را لایق و سزست که عنایتش جمیع عالم ... انشاء الله بعنایت الهی فائز باشید و بما یهذب به اخلاق العباد متوجه و ناطق
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @importance of community building, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @oneness; unity of religion, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @contention and conflict
